message:
feat(telemetry): add unified telemetry schema module (ft-3681t.7.1)

Add unified_telemetry module declaration to lib.rs. The module itself
was committed in 5bcc1368. Provides:

- TelemetryEnvelope: universal wrapper with trace context, correlation IDs,
  source attribution, redaction labels, and health status
- SubsystemPayload: tagged union wrapping all subsystem snapshots
  (policy, swarm scheduler/queue, mux pool, runtime, storage, ingest)
- UnifiedFleetSnapshot: top-level fleet-wide aggregation with per-layer
  health rollup and redaction ceiling
- CausalityLink: directed edges for cross-subsystem causality tracking
- EnvelopeBuilder: fluent API for constructing envelopes
- 16 unit tests (all passing)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
